text:
さあさあ、後半戦が始まりましたよー！
前半と変わらないルールなのに
難易度はアップ！　わっくわくですね！

ここは遠距離攻撃が意外と辛いですよ。
どちらを先に倒すかは
お任せですけど、ね！

Okay, it's time for the latter half of the
fight! The rules are the same as before,
but the difficulty's spiked up!

Long-distance attacks are surprisingly tough
to execute here. It's up to you to decide
which one you take out first, though!
